title: A New Bounty Spreads
description: On pages 1–4, a new bounty spreads focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.
scene: On pages 1–4, a new bounty spreads focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.

dialogue.speaker: News Coo
dialogue.text: Don't you think it's getting a bit too expensive?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: raise the price again and I won't be buying your papers anymore.

dialogue.speaker: News Coo
dialogue.text: What're you getting so riled up about? It's just a newspaper.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Daily expenses all add up, don't you know!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I thought you were done with saving up money?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: don't be stupid. From now on, I'm going to be saving up money for no one but me alone.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's no way I'm going to be a pennless pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: OK, OK. I'm in the middle of developing my secret tabasco star so keep away!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: an enemy who gets this in their eye,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh come on! Can't I just have at least one?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: These are Nami's beloved Orange trees! I won't allow anyone to lay even a single finger on them!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh well. I'm in a good mood so I'll drop it then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nami! Rest assured, my defense powered by love is infallible! »

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're finally on our way to grand line!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The ship now heads out for grand line.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So in short, our branch forces,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: are unable to deal with this particular pirate crew...?

summary: This part shifts the story from local East Blue battles to the wider pirate world reacting to Luffy’s new bounty.
